scripts.desktop:sync: powershell -Command "if(Test-Path apps/desktop/out){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/desktop/out }; if(Test-Path apps/web/out){ Copy-Item -Path apps/web/out -Destination apps/desktop/out -Recurse -Force } else { Write-Host 'Warning: apps/web/out not found. Build web first to sync UI.' }"
